channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Grasshopper
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a drink that's tastier than a bug.

Duration: 02:51

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Who Stole Fire Extinguishers From a Hotel?
item.description:
Paul, Aparna, Kulap, and Reggie drink grasshoppers and try not to be suspicious.

Duration: 42:26

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, paul scheer, aparna nancherla, kulap vilaysack, reggie watts, comedy bang bang

item.title: Grant's Peach
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a drink that can take a pounding.

Duration: 03:50

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY
